description_long: This sculpture features a seated, draped human figure rendered in a classical style, positioned on a stepped stone base. Behind the figure rises a large, upright cross, suggesting a religious or memorial context. The base consists of three broad steps, with the figure resting on the middle step and the cross mounted on the uppermost platform. The entire structure appears to be made of light-colored stone, possibly marble, with subtle weathering and some surface discoloration. The front of the base includes an inscribed plaque, likely commemorative, though the text is not fully legible. The overall composition conveys solemnity and reverence, typical of funerary or memorial monuments.
description: A classical stone sculpture of a seated figure beside a large cross, set on a stepped base with an inscribed plaque. The light-colored stone and detailed drapery evoke a solemn, memorial atmosphere.
description_view_0: The sculpture is seen from an angle, highlighting the side of the seated figure and the depth of the stepped base.
description_view_1: The front view shows the seated figure facing forward, the cross behind, and the inscribed plaque clearly visible on the base.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the draped back of the figure and the full height of the cross, with the steps receding to the left.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the back of the cross and the figure, with the stepped base extending outward.
attribute_subject_matter: seated human figure with cross, memorial theme
attribute_location_context: The sculpture appears to be installed outdoors, likely in a cemetery, memorial park, or similar commemorative urban setting.
